meta.description: 10 independent, read-only, verifiable questions answerable only by using the taobao-sourcing tools. Q1-Q8 are verifiable offline against the committed fixture tests/fixtures/736546459871/detail_res.json (see tests/test_evals.py); Q9-Q10 require a live session (search/reviews). Pass target: >= 8/10.

question.text: What is the cheapest in-stock variant of product 736546459871, and its price?
question.expected: "P100 质保7天 80个起售" (the 80-unit wholesale tier) at ¥400.

question.text: What is the most expensive variant of 736546459871, and its price?
question.expected: "P100 质保3年 以换代修" (3-year warranty) at ¥450.

question.text: How many SKU variants does 736546459871 offer?
What is the price of the 7-day-warranty "volume" tier (退货承担运费20元)?
What is the full price range across all variants of 736546459871?
Are all three variants currently in stock (available)?
question.expected: Yes — all three have stock > 0 and available=true.

question.text: What is the single property-group name used by 736546459871's variants?
question.expected: 颜色分类 (it encodes warranty/service tiers, not colours).

question.text: Among recent reviews of 736546459871, which variant did the reviewer who mentioned "ollama"/"comfyui" buy, and did it include photos?
question.expected: "P100 质保7天 走量商品 退货承担运费20元", with photos (has_images=true).

question.text: Searching "tesla p100 16g", what is the top result by units sold, and which shop?
question.expected: The 736546459871 listing ("特斯拉P100 16G…DeepSeek推荐用卡"), shop 南京海雀显卡, ~700+ 付款.
